'''Wirriz''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] serving in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
After [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] coerced the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]], [[Tuz]], into becoming a [[Privateer/Legends|privateer]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], Wirriz—in tandem with [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Fortune (Human)|Fortune]]—was placed in charge of supervising his actions. He worked with Tuz while posing as his [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]], assisting in the capture of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] equipment and delivering it to the Alliance.<ref name="XWOSG" />

In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], several months into the operation, Vice Admiral Wirriz, along with Tuz, Fortune, and a pair of [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]], delivered stolen Imperial technology to the Alliance [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari cruiser]] [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']], and provided information to Commanders [[H. S'man|S'man]] and [[Hamo Blastwell]] leading to an [[Attack on the Imperial repair dock|attack on an Imperial repair dock]].<ref name="XWOSG" />
